compiled_state.title: test-format-fix.sh: flaky test produces intermittent failures unrelated to code changes
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
test-format-fix.sh fails intermittently in the full test suite. Verified pre-existing: failure reproduces on main branch with changes stashed. Not introduced by any changes in this session.

## Steps to Reproduce
Run the full test suite via validate.sh --ci. test-format-fix.sh fails on some runs.

## Expected Behavior
test-format-fix.sh should pass consistently.

## Actual Behavior
Intermittent failure, independent of code changes.

## Notes
Pre-existing flaky test. Needs investigation into test isolation or timing dependency.
